title: Pilosella tephrocephala
taxonomy: Pilosella tephrocephala is classified within the family Asteraceae, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as daisies or sunflowers. It belongs to the genus Pilosella, a group of plants that are often referred to as "mouse-ear daisies" due to their small, rounded leaves. This species is further divided into several subspecies, each with distinct characteristics and growth habits. The classification of Pilosella tephrocephala is based on its morphology, ecology, and genetic features. The exact classification may vary depending on the source and the most recent taxonomic updates.
